title: Implications of regional variations in climate change vulnerability and mitigation behaviour for social-climate dynamics
author: Punnavajhala, Amrita
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The code runs on MATLAB R2021a and has been tested on MacOS 12.7.5. To install, download files and follow steps listed in README. 
 Update: Run time is approximately four hours to complete steps 1-20 in README file.
